globalRisks: spell-timing beats slipping into mechanism summary

sceneAudits.biggestGap: The first live combat turn let chamber cold drift toward atmospheric mood instead of staying with breath, blood, and light on the seal.

dialogue: reveal exchange kept against the seal and the turning room
exit: Arthas turning back from Terenas toward them

sceneAudits.biggestGap: Several spell beats still named theory or timing in summary instead of cashing them out through blade-note, footing, cracked marble, and the back-turned second Jaina needs.

dialogue: combat beats left pinned to Sylvanas's bodily cost and Arthas's turn
exit: one breath with his back turned

sceneAudits.biggestGap: The soul-echo and wounded-blade aftermath risked drifting into neat explanation instead of staying fragmentary, painful, and physically manifest on the marble.

dialogue: warning to leave the blade untouched stays tied to Sylvanas's visible wound state
exit: wounded note answering on the marble before witnesses close the room

risksFound: sentimental overreach in the soul-echo close
anthropomorphic summary in the blade-state beat
fight-mechanism phrasing lingering too close to workshop shorthand
fixesApplied: cut the last neat boyhood vignette and left the soul-echo fragmentary
